grok_video_prompt_pack.main_instruction: Animate the woman from the uploaded base image as a real adult woman casually presenting her outfit in a hyper-realistic POV-style phone video. The video must feel attractive, charismatic and attention-grabbing, with a slightly flirty confidence, but still natural, tasteful and realistic. Preserve the original person, face, body, outfit, lighting, camera angle and background exactly.

global_rules.base_image_usage: Use the uploaded image as the only visual source.
global_rules.identity: Preserve the exact same woman from the image. Do not change facial structure, body proportions, skin tone, hair, expression style or age appearance.
global_rules.outfit: Preserve the exact same outfit from the image. Do not add or remove clothing details.
global_rules.environment: Preserve the original background, lighting, shadows, camera angle, lens perspective and composition.
global_rules.camera: POV phone recording, subtle handheld micro-movements only, no zoom, no shake, no cinematic camera movement.
global_rules.style: Hyper-realistic, casual, magnetic, soft flirt energy, confident but not exaggerated.
global_rules.audio: No talking, no voice, no music, no sound effects.
global_rules.visual_restrictions: No text, no subtitles, no UI, no overlays, no effects, no stickers, no logos.
global_rules.sexualization_limit: Attractive and attention-grabbing, but tasteful. No explicit sexual behavior, no vulgar posing, no exaggerated sensuality, no twerking, no licking lips, no inappropriate gestures.

ready_variations.name: Aproximar com confiança
ready_variations.best_for: General fashion video where the woman needs to look attractive, confident and natural.
ready_variations.viewer_hook_goal: Make the viewer feel noticed by the subject through eye contact, soft facial timing and a controlled approach toward the camera.

timeline.action: The subject starts at the original distance with a neutral relaxed face. She makes calm eye contact with the camera, then slightly tilts her head as if noticing the viewer. The expression is subtle, not exaggerated.
A very brief soft smile appears and fades naturally. She shifts her weight gently from one leg to the other, creating a small natural body movement.
She takes one small step forward toward the camera. The step is smooth, casual and confident, not runway-like. Her arms move naturally with the body.
One hand gently moves to the upper-front fabric area of the existing outfit. She lightly touches or smooths the fabric as if showing the fit and texture. Do not add any new clothing detail.
She releases the fabric and lets one hand naturally rest on the waist. Her expression returns to neutral with relaxed lips and natural breathing.
She performs a subtle torso rotation, only a few degrees, to show the outfit fit. The movement is attractive but tasteful, with a slight hip shift and relaxed shoulders.
She looks slightly away from the camera for a moment, then looks back. A short warm smile appears, like a natural flirtatious reaction, then softens.
She settles into a relaxed stance, still alive with micro-movements, no frozen final pose.

ready_variations.expression_direction: Neutral eye contact, brief soft smile, neutral again, then a second small smile near the end. No constant grin.
ready_variations.best_for_pt: Atrair pelo olhar, sorriso leve e aproximação controlada.

ready_variations.name: Olhar com charme
ready_variations.best_for: Videos where the goal is to hold attention through facial expression, eye contact and subtle charisma.
ready_variations.viewer_hook_goal: Create a feeling that the subject is directly interacting with the viewer without talking.

timeline.action: The subject starts relaxed, looking slightly off-camera. Her face is neutral and calm.
She slowly turns her eyes toward the camera before turning her head fully. The eye movement should feel intentional but natural, like she just noticed the viewer.
A tiny playful smile appears for less than one second. The smile is controlled, soft and realistic, with slight cheek movement only.
She gently adjusts her posture, lifting her upper body slightly with natural breathing. One shoulder moves subtly backward, making the outfit look more presentable.
One hand lightly touches the existing clothing area near the front or side, depending on the outfit. The fingers remain relaxed and anatomically correct.
She releases the fabric and makes a small side-to-side weight shift. The movement should feel attractive and human, not like dancing.
She gently brushes hair backward near the side of the head. The gesture is casual, quick and natural, lasting about one second.
She looks back at the camera with a soft confident expression. The smile fades naturally into a relaxed neutral face before the video ends.

ready_variations.expression_direction: Slightly playful but not exaggerated. The face must alternate between neutral, soft smile and relaxed attention.
ready_variations.best_for_pt: Prender atenção com olhar, expressão e ajuste natural do cabelo.

ready_variations.name: Valorizar o caimento
ready_variations.best_for: Videos where the outfit shape, waist, fit or silhouette needs to look more attractive.
ready_variations.viewer_hook_goal: Use posture, small hip shifts and torso angle changes to make the outfit look more visually appealing while staying realistic.

timeline.action: The subject begins facing the camera with a neutral, calm expression. She is not frozen; subtle breathing is visible.
She gently shifts her weight onto one leg. One hand naturally moves to rest on the waist or side of the body.
She slightly rotates her torso to one side, only a few degrees, to show the outfit silhouette. The movement is smooth and controlled.
She returns her face toward the camera while keeping the body slightly angled. A small confident smile appears briefly and fades.
The free hand lightly smooths the existing fabric at the front or side of the outfit. Do not pull, stretch or reshape the clothing.
She takes one very small step forward, keeping balance natural. The outfit moves with realistic fabric physics.
She makes a subtle hip shift side-to-side, extremely mild and tasteful, as if naturally adjusting her stance.
She turns her head slightly to one side, then back to the camera. Her expression becomes soft and approachable, then returns to neutral.

ready_variations.expression_direction: Confident, slightly flirty, but controlled. Neutral moments must remain present.
ready_variations.best_for_pt: Destacar cintura, formato e caimento da roupa.

ready_variations.name: Aproximar sem zoom
ready_variations.best_for: Videos where the subject needs to feel closer and more engaging without camera zoom.
ready_variations.viewer_hook_goal: Make the viewer feel pulled into the video through the subject's small forward movement and direct presence.

timeline.action: The subject starts at the original distance. She makes soft eye contact with the camera, then lets her gaze briefly move downward toward the outfit.
She takes one small natural step forward. The camera does not zoom; only the subject moves slightly closer.
She pauses naturally in the closer position, still breathing and moving subtly. A tiny smile appears, then fades.
She lightly touches the existing front fabric area with relaxed fingers, as if drawing attention to the clothing fit.
She releases the fabric and lowers the hand naturally. Her other hand may rest softly near the waist.
She gently leans her upper body back a few centimeters to return to a more natural distance, without stepping dramatically.
She brushes hair backward or makes a small posture adjustment, whichever looks more natural for the base image.
She ends with calm eye contact and a relaxed expression, not smiling constantly and not frozen.

ready_variations.expression_direction: Eye contact is the main attraction. Smile appears briefly only twice at most.
ready_variations.best_for_pt: Criar proximidade movendo a pessoa, sem movimentar a câmera.

ready_variations.name: Chamar atenção naturalmente
ready_variations.best_for: A more 'biscoitando' version while still looking like a real casual fashion recording.
ready_variations.viewer_hook_goal: Create stronger visual attraction using confidence, timing, eye contact, subtle smile, posture and outfit presentation, without becoming vulgar.

timeline.action: The subject starts with her face neutral, looking slightly away from the camera. Her body remains relaxed and natural.
She turns her eyes toward the camera first, then slowly turns her head. The movement should feel magnetic but realistic.
A soft confident smile appears briefly. She slightly shifts her weight, creating a natural curve in the posture without exaggeration.
One hand moves naturally to the waist. The other hand stays relaxed near the body.
She gently rotates her torso a few degrees to show the outfit fit. The movement is subtle, attractive and casual.
She lightly touches the existing front or side fabric area, smoothing it delicately with relaxed fingers.
She releases the fabric and takes one small step forward, keeping the camera framing stable and natural.
She briefly brushes hair backward near the side of the head. The gesture is quick, effortless and realistic.
She looks directly at the camera with a warm soft smile, then lets the smile fade naturally before the end.

ready_variations.expression_direction: More magnetic than neutral, but never exaggerated. Use soft eye contact, tiny smiles and relaxed confidence.
ready_variations.best_for_pt: Aumentar a atração visual com naturalidade e sem exagero.
